        print(f"{n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check ascii
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nRegion (rows 22-30, cols 38-50):")
for i in range(22, 30):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {ascii_lines[i][38:50]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
